title: Continent Hopper
short_description: The delivery labels blew away! Hop animals, landmarks and countries back to their home continents.
description: Hoppy the kangaroo runs the world's only Continent Delivery Service — but the address labels blew away! Help her deliver each animal, landmark and country back to its home continent before the drone gives up: do wild lions live in Africa or Asia? Is Mexico in North or South America? Which continent owns Mount Everest? Every miss comes with a friendly fun-fact so the next hop lands. Younger players sort famous animals and landmarks; older players tackle countries, mountain ranges and deserts across all seven continents. A free online continents and world geography game for kids in grades 1–5, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the home continent before the timer runs out.
